title: qg: Queue Generation System
description: Configuration-driven, multi-vendor acquisition queue generation for mass spectrometry. Turns plain sample lists into batch-aware, vendor-ready acquisition queues with reproducible run-order randomization, systematic pattern-driven QC injection, sampler- and plate-aware positioning, and output writers for XCalibur, Chronos, and Hystar.
